bio: Originally from England, I first fell in love with Austin as a university exchange student in 1997 and returned as soon as I could. I moved to real estate after a 20-year career in sales leadership in the ed-tech industry, where I worked with high schools across the country and negotiated large-scale accounts. With a keen eye for understanding a property’s potential, I will help you find your perfect home to rent, buy or invest, and will make sure you sell your house for the best price possible. On those rare occasions when I'm not attempting to corral my three rambunctious young boys, I can be found with my head buried in a book, engaging in DIY projects, swimming, traveling, and watching 80s films.

bio: Chris grew up in New Jersey and attended Villanova University outside of Philadelphia, where he met his wife, fellow real estate agent Isabel Affinito. He graduated with degrees in finance and real estate. He began his career working in New York City for KPMG's Economic and Valuation Services group, where he appraised commercial real estate. After a few years of working in the city he left KPMG to work for a commercial real estate developer where he was responsible for sourcing new acquisitions, raising capital and coordinating dispositions. He was involved with the purchase, development, and sale of over $500 million of office, retail and industrial real estate. In 2014 he and Isabel began to consider moving away from New Jersey. It only took a few trips to Austin for Chris and Isabel to fall in love with the city. They decided to move here permanently and work together selling residential real estate. They quickly hit their stride, selling over $10 million of residential real estate in their first year and winning their company's Rookie of the Year award. They have grown their business and production each year since then. After becoming acclimated to his new home and the Austin real estate market, Chris dusted off his skills and knowledge of real estate development and began building homes. He founded Urban ATX Development, which has grown to a $25 million development company focused primarily on development of residential and multifamily properties in Central Austin. Contact Chris with questions about purchasing luxury new construction properties or investing in Central Austin real estate.

bio:
Isabel Affinito is a licensed real estate professional and fractional COO specializing in operational design for real estate–adjacent companies.

After over a decade in residential real estate sales, Isabel transitioned from active production into development, construction and operational consulting. She now partners with real estate and construction-adjacent companies to design systems, strengthen leadership teams, and build businesses that run smoothly without constant owner involvement. She offers fractional COO services, helping founders professionalize their back offices and scale sustainably.

She maintains her real estate license to support past clients through trusted referrals and to stay closely connected to the industry she knows deeply.

Today, her work focuses on helping founders move from reactive growth to structured, scalable operations, so their businesses can serve their lives, not eclipse them.

Learn more about what Isabel is up to now at isabelaffinito.com

bio:
Raised in Bastrop, Texas, I’ve had the privilege of watching this community grow and evolve, and I’m proud to play a part in its development. With over 10 years in the real estate business, a broker’s license, and a reputation as the Texas Super Realtor, I bring a wealth of knowledge, skill, and energy to every client I work with. My commitment to the Central Texas market runs deep, and I’m passionate about helping buyers and sellers navigate this vibrant region with confidence and success.

As the Texas Super Realtor, I’m more than just a real estate agent—I’m a local expert and a true pro at what I do. Whether you’re buying your first home or selling to start a new chapter, you deserve someone who knows the market inside and out and is fully dedicated to your best interests. I blend my decade of experience, broker-level expertise, and advanced marketing strategies to help my clients succeed, ensuring every property shines in the best possible light and that each client feels fully supported.

Central Texas is a competitive market, but my strong negotiating skills and innovative, tech-savvy marketing techniques give my clients a real advantage. By combining the best web-based tools with an in-depth knowledge of local housing trends, I make sure properties sell quickly and at top value.

Outside of work, I love spending time with my family. My 6-year-old son keeps me on my toes, and watching him grow into an amazing human who loves life just as I do brings me endless joy. If you’re ready to make a move in Central Texas, let’s work together to achieve your real estate goals—you’re in good hands with the Texas Super Realtor!

bio: Chris relocated to Austin from Chicago in 2009, and like most people new to Austin, he passionately embraced his new life of breakfast tacos, swimming holes, bar patios, live music, and smoked brisket. As his love for the city blossomed, he was impressed by everything the many different areas and unique neighborhoods offered its residents and moved around town to experience the best local attractions and overall vibes. He became devotedly interested in the thriving real estate market in central Texas and how its many intricacies were affecting the lives of his friends, family, and everybody else around him. After a few years of success working on the financial side of real estate transactions as a mortgage loan originator, he realized his true drive and sense of fulfillment came from helping people with more than just the numbers. He’s a people person with a real knack for negotiation. Chris makes sure his clients all know “I’m going to work tirelessly to find you the most options, secure the best deal possible for YOU, and be the easiest agent to work with.” Spyglass Realty was a natural fit and offered Chris not just a place to hang a license, but an amazing culture, industry leading technology and tools, and most importantly, a group of highly successful agents he could be proud to be a part of, collaborate with, and learn from. The training never stops at Spyglass Realty because the real estate industry never stops changing and everyone benefits from learning and working together as a team. “I’ll always dedicate time to staying ahead of the curve when it comes to the latest news, strategy, and technology so that when you work with me you have a REALTOR® you can count on to provide the highest level of customer service in the industry.”

bio:
Ricky Amend has been a licensed agent since early 2016, originally specializing in real estate investment properties. Over the years, he has expanded his expertise to focus on helping buyers relocating to the Austin area and working with sellers to strategically market and sell their homes.

Ricky takes a personalized, socially connected approach to real estate, building lasting relationships and delivering results that exceed his clients’ goals—whether they're searching for the perfect home in a new city or preparing to sell for top dollar. His background managing renovation projects gives him a unique eye for potential, allowing him to guide buyers through home selection and sellers through strategic improvements that boost value.

Highly driven and deeply knowledgeable, Ricky thrives in the fast-paced Austin market. His passion for real estate stems from a lifelong interest in smart investing and helping others build wealth through property ownership.

When he’s not working hard for his clients, Ricky is chasing his next adventure—whether it's snowboarding, building cars, riding dirt bikes, or even flying a jetpack. For Ricky, it’s all about taking care of business and having fun—no exceptions.

bio:
As a Real Estate Professional and licensed Realtor® for more than 8 years, Kyle Anderman has helped countless families, individuals, and investors buy and sell homes. A native of Louisiana, Kyle attended Business School at LSU where he opened his first business at 21, a gourmet cupcake bakery called Frosted Cupcakes.

Continuing to open businesses over the years, Kyle brought his entrepreneurial background and spirit to Real Estate in 2016 and never looked back. When not serving clients, Kyle can usually be found on the tennis court or in a Starbucks working on his next novel. A lover of writing and creating, he’s always thinking of the next big idea.

Known for leveraging his business acumen and negotiation expertise to secure the best price and terms for every client, Kyle is committed to putting his client’s best interests first, while providing knowledge, insight, and protection throughout the contract phase, whether buying or selling.

bio:
Originally from Metro Detroit, I have spent the last 8  years as a pharmacist, earning my Doctorate in  2014. It was through healthcare that I discovered the many ways I could be of service to people,  shifting my focus to helping people navigate the difficulties of buying or selling a home.  

I learned very quickly the financial and emotional challenges that come with that life decision, and I’m blessed to be entrusted in this process. Whether you’re a first-time home buyer, a seller looking to relocate, or just have different housing needs as you navigate the next phase of your life, I look forward to helping you accomplish your goals. 

Some other things to note about me. I am bilingual,  I have traveled to over a dozen countries and 5  continents, and have completed multiple Ironman  70.3 Triathlons. In my free time, I enjoy trying the many great restaurants Austin has to offer, running along LadyBird Lake, and practicing yoga. I look forward to being of service to you.

bio:
Real estate is more than a career to me. It is a calling rooted in service, perseverance, and helping people achieve their dreams of homeownership. I approach every client relationship with a firm belief that nothing is impossible and bring that mindset into every transaction I handle. 

My life is grounded in faith, family, and the lessons gained through real world experience. As a devoted mother and someone who understands the importance of stability, trust, and home, I recognize that buying or selling a property is not just a financial decision—it is a deeply personal one. 

I am known for my strong work ethic, meticulous attention to detail, and heartfelt commitment to the people I serve. My goal is to make the process smooth, transparent, and even enjoyable by listening carefully, communicating clearly, and advocating confidently for my clients every step of the way. 

There is nothing more rewarding than handing over the keys and knowing I have helped someone step into a new chapter of life. I am honored to be a trusted partner in such an important journey and would welcome the opportunity to help you turn your real estate goals into reality.

bio: I am a New England native but I finally made it to Austin several years ago. I reside in Cedar Park with my Husband of 21 years, my 3 teenage daughters, and our 3 beloved pups. I absolutely love what I do and that is demonstrated to my clients. I am available 7 days a week and answer my phone. Understanding and listening to my clients from the first point of contact to close is key to ensuring a smooth transaction. I will educate and communicate to the best of my ability through the entire process. When I am not working, I love playing tennis and spending time with my family. We enjoy boating and fostering for Texas Humane Heroes. I would love the opportunity to meet and discuss your real estate dreams.

bio:
Meet Corbin, your well-rounded and charismatic real estate agent, whose bold approach sets him apart in the industry. Corbin's journey into real estate was guided by a family friend who recognized his knack for mentorship and advising, paving the way for a successful career in the field. Corbin proves that determination and passion can drive success in any endeavor.

Professionally, his heart lies in the music industry, with a deep interest in marketing, production, and promotion. However, Corbin's true excitement stems from the opportunity to create a fulfilling career alongside a supportive and like-minded group of professionals.

Beyond the world of real estate and music, Corbin finds personal fulfillment in pursuing his interests. You can catch him at the gym, dedicated to maintaining a healthy and active lifestyle, or immersed in a recording studio, channeling his creative energy into musical endeavors. Chess and cars also hold a special place in his heart, showcasing his diverse range of passions.

Corbin lives by the motto "the only easy day was yesterday," a testament to his unwavering dedication and constant pursuit of excellence. Approachable and easy to talk to, he welcomes any conversation, making him the perfect partner for your real estate journey. Whether you're seeking a dream home, an investment property, or expert advice in the real estate market, Corbin's combination of expertise, passion, and approachability makes him the ideal choice to guide you through the process.

bio:
Eric Beacom – Realtor | Investor | Veteran

Eric Beacom is a seasoned real estate professional with over a decade of experience helping clients navigate the market. Since moving in 2015, he has been deeply involved in real estate investing, specializing in remodeling and new construction. With a vast understanding of home design and construction, Eric ensures his clients make informed, strategic decisions whether they’re buying, selling, or investing.

A U.S. Army veteran and former medic, Eric applies the same dedication, integrity, and problem-solving skills to his real estate career as he did in service. His mission is clear: to help his clients WIN by finding the best opportunities and guiding them every step of the way.

Eric has been married to his wife, Dawn, for 19 years, and together they have three active children who are passionate about sports. When he’s not working on real estate deals, you’ll find him cheering on his kids, staying involved in the community, or planning the next big success for his clients.

bio: The secret to success is to know something better than anyone else knows it… And Ted Bose knows Austin, Texas. Born and raised in an Austin real estate family and having lived and worked in over a dozen neighborhoods all over town, this native has spent a lifetime getting to know every nook and cranny of our vibrant city, its dynamic culture, and the unique histories of its many neighborhoods. The secret to Ted’s success is his personal approach to business and unique ability to get to know his clients -buyer or seller- to make the ideal real estate transaction both successful and seamless. Ted has built a sterling reputation on his honesty, professionalism, and creativity coupled with his personalized service. Ted takes enormous pride in his clients' satisfaction and works tirelessly to yield exceptional results, resulting in a roster of loyal repeat and referral clients spanning decades. With a history as President of a successful talent agency, resort manager for the world’s largest hospitality company, federal and state employee, and senior project manager for a Fortune 25 corporation, Ted’s vast experiences have prepared and trained him for real estate success. A true global citizen, Ted has lived and worked in Asia, Europe and both U.S. coasts. He has searched for homes all over the globe and is able to leverage his personal experiences helping clients relocating here do the same. When not working, Ted enjoys reading, gardening, travel, spending time with friends and family, and most of all, doting on his newborn twin daughters. Ted’s warmth and humor, combined with his boundless energy, make him the perfect choice when choosing your real estate professional.

bio:
Meet Samantha Breeland, an accomplished and passionate real estate professional who brings a wealth of local expertise and a passion for her hometown to the table. Samantha's journey has taken her from the heart of Longhorn country to the bustling streets of New York and a career in luxury retail before returning home and establishing her roots in the vibrant city of Austin, Texas. With an unwavering entrepreneurial spirit, Samantha pursued her passion for fashion and love by owning and managing Bella Bridesmaids, a beloved local bridesmaid dress store, for an impressive decade and a half. Her keen eye for trends and her commitment to providing exceptional customer service have become the hallmark of her career.

Hailing from the charming neighborhood of Westlake Hills and a proud University of Texas alum, Samantha has deep roots in the Austin community. With nearly five years of experience in the industry, she has honed her skills through prestigious international brokerages such as Sotheby's and Knight Frank, gaining valuable insights into both local and global real estate trends. As a Certified Luxury Real Estate Agent with a proven track record, Samantha is now excited to collaborate with the impressive agents at Spyglass Realty who share her commitment to excellence and genuine compassion.

Beyond her thriving real estate career, Samantha's heart beats for animals. She is actively involved in volunteering for Pug Rescue Austin and Austin Pets Alive!, two remarkable organizations dedicated to rescuing and rehabilitating animals in the Austin area. In her leisure time, she fully embraces Austin's natural beauty and vibrant lifestyle. She can often be found exploring local bodies of water like Lake Austin or the Guadalupe River, staying active outdoors, and relishing quality moments with her family and beloved pug, Milly. An avid foodie and wine enthusiast, Samantha loves exploring the diverse culinary scene and trying out new bars and restaurants around town.

Samantha's dedication to putting clients first is the cornerstone of her practice. She takes the time to truly understand each client's needs, making the home buying or selling experience personalized and stress-free. As a result, she has built a reputation for achieving outstanding results and ensuring utmost client satisfaction. With an unwavering entrepreneurial spirit, Samantha pursued her passion for fashion and love by owning and managing Bella Bridesmaids, a beloved local bridesmaid dress store, for an impressive decade and a half. Her keen eye for trends and her commitment to providing exceptional customer service have become the hallmark of her career.Hailing from the charming neighborhood of Westlake Hills and a proud University of Texas alum, Samantha has deep roots in the Austin community. With nearly five years of experience in the industry, she has honed her skills through prestigious international brokerages such as Sotheby's and Knight Frank, gaining valuable insights into both local and global real estate trends. bio: Damon is the principal agent of the Damon Brown Group. Damon has been in the business of exceeding his clients’ expectations for over 20 years. bio:
Buying or selling a home is more than a transaction. It’s a life transition. I’m honored to walk with my clients through that process with honesty, compassion, strong communication, and a relentless work ethic.

Growing up in the same home from age five through adulthood and later moving all over the country as the wife of a now Army Veteran, I deeply understand both the comfort of stability and the challenges of change. That life experience shapes how I serve every client with empathy, patience, and purpose.

Before becoming a full-time Realtor, I built a career in senior care, multifamily housing, and real estate marketing. Those roles strengthened my ability to connect with people, guide families through emotional decisions, and bring creativity to how I help clients succeed.

Whether you're a first-time buyer, a growing family, downsizing, or preparing for a major life transition, I’m here to help you move with clarity and confidence. My approach is grounded in integrity and inspired by my faith, which guides how I care for and advocate for the people I serve.

I'm actively involved in my local church community and find great joy in serving others both professionally and personally. I’ve been happily married since 2004. My husband and I are raising three amazing daughters and two lovable pups. In my free time, I love to sing, gather with friends and family, and find joy in everyday moments.

Let’s move you into lasting value and everyday joy.

bio:
Meet Josh – Your Trusted Texas Realtor

Josh has called Austin home since 1977, making him a true Austinite with deep roots in the community. With a genuine passion for real estate and a commitment to helping people achieve their housing goals, Josh brings over two decades of experience and local knowledge to every transaction.

He began his real estate career in 2003, following four years in the mortgage lending industry, giving him a well-rounded perspective that benefits his clients every step of the way. Over the past 23 years, Josh has built a diverse portfolio—handling everything from rentals to ranches and everything in between.

While he primarily serves Austin and the surrounding areas, Josh’s expertise spans Texas, everything from San Antonio to Fort Worth and Camp Wood to Houston. Whether you're buying, selling, renting or investing, Josh is dedicated to making your real estate journey smooth, successful, and even enjoyable.

Let’s turn your housing dreams into reality—reach out today!

bio:
A full-time Realtor since 2008, Kristi Richard's diverse background has set an ideal stage for her career as a full-time real estate professional.

Kristi spent much of her earlier adult life traveling the world as the business and marketing manager to a professional magician, simultaneously filling the role of magician's assistant.

Working a residency at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas (that included a record-breaking 9,000 performances) before transitioning to a cruise ship residency allowed Kristi to experience many different cultures and prepared her to interact and work with many kinds of people.

Prior to her work in the entertainment industry, Kristi received her bachelor's degree in Fashion Merchandising and Marketing from Stephen F. Austin University and thrived in several roles involving sales and communication.

After concluding that chapter, life's natural progression led Kristi to real estate. A self-proclaimed "professional socializer", Kristi counts communication, openness, and availability among her best traits.

Within 2 years Kristi was a top producer at Zip Realty in Las Vegas, earning a spot in the coveted Presidents Club alongside the cities best agents.

A native Texan, Kristi decided it was time to move back to the state, choosing Austin as her new homestead in 2012. Kristi didn't miss a beat and continued to earn multiple Top Producer, President’s Club, and Circle of Excellence awards and she acquired her broker’s license in 2019.

In 2021, Kristi and her husband James, moved down to North Padre Island to enjoy a slower pace that island life offers. Kristi and James are also owners of Paradise Cart Rentals in Port Aransas.

Kristi prides herself on providing constant and open communication to her clients and has assisted all variants of clients including first-time homebuyers, sellers, re-locators, distressed homeowners in need of a short sale, as well as savvy investors.

She enjoys educating her clients during their real estate transactions and making sure they understand each facet of the process.

Overcoming real estate hurdles and problem-solving are among some of the most exciting aspects of real estate for Kristi, topped only by the satisfaction of knowing she's found a client the perfect home.

Her negotiation skills, experience, and competitive nature ensure her clients always get the best deal possible when crossing a transaction's finish line.

When Kristi isn't practicing real estate, she enjoys a myriad of different activities. An avid tennis player, she has participated in several tennis leagues over the last 15 years. She and James enjoy taking their boat out for fishing and canal cruising, country two-stepping and taking their dog Stormy for runs on the beach.

bio:
Carissa Chandler is both a native Texan and a seasoned real estate professional with over 8 years of experience. Throughout her career she’s managed to build a vast network of relationships, both inside and outside of the real estate industry, allowing her to offer unique insights and resourceful solutions for her clients.

She excels in simplifying complex processes and keeping clients focused on what truly matters, even in the most stressful of transactions.

Known for her sunny disposition, being proactively communicative and fiercely loyal to her client's best interests, Carissa is committed to building lasting relationships that go beyond the sale. She believes real estate is not just about transactions, but about helping clients achieve their goals and watching them thrive in their new homes. When she’s not guiding clients through the process, she enjoys staying grounded with yoga, thrifting fashion and home decor finds, and finding a patio with great food and live music.

Her market knowledge is vast—whether advising clients on Austin and its surrounding areas unique commute times, helping parents decide on the right investment property for their Aggie student in College Station, or guiding medical professionals and lake life pursuers in her hometown of the Temple/Belton area, Carissa ensures that each client’s needs are met with a tailored approach. Her clients appreciate her positivity, humor, and ability to break down processes into easily digestible nuggets, all while keeping the process transparent and approachable.

When it’s time to celebrate a successful deal, you’ll likely find Carissa posting an Instagram story enjoying a full-course meal at a fine dining spot, surrounded by those who matter most—whether that’s friends, family, or even happily enjoying her own company and accomplishment solo.

Connect with Carissa today for all your home buying and selling needs!

I graduated from UT Austin with a degree in Human Development and Family Sciences and later pursued nursing in an accelerated program. Those experiences taught me patience, attention to detail, and how to guide people through big life decisions—skills that now help me in real estate.

I moved from Korea to the U.S. in 2010 and have lived in Austin ever since. Over the years, I’ve watched this city grow and change, and that’s part of what inspired me to get into real estate. bio:
As a native Austinite, April brings a unique knowledge of the area to share with her clients as they navigate buying, selling and investing in this ever growing and changing city.
After graduating from Texas State University with a business degree in Accounting in 2002, she built a thriving residential cleaning company that she ran for 18 years in the Austin and surrounding communities. During that time, along with her team, she was able to work closely with her clients to personalize a service to meet their unique needs and built long term customer relationships that she still cherishes today. In 2019, April discovered that her loyalty to her clients and her love for the city could be carried forward into the real estate world where she has always had a passion. 
Since then, April has represented clients all over the greater Austin area from San Marcos to Killeen. She has been an integral part of one of the top teams in the area and has an extensive knowledge of real estate contracts to help guide you through your transaction seamlessly. She is focused on professionalism, attention to detail and commitment to always putting your needs first. What clients say they appreciate most about working with April is her patient and calming confidence yet tenacious demeanor on their behalf. She strives to demonstrate the highest level of integrity and dedication with every real estate client she works alongside.
During her downtime, she enjoys volunteering at her local animal shelter where she stays busy walking dogs and falling in love with each of them! She is happiest spending time with her husband, two daughters, three dogs and has a special place in her heart for taking time away with them at the beach in Port Aransas.

Since then, April has represented clients all over the greater Austin area from San Marcos to Killeen. She has been an integral part of one of the top teams in the area and has an extensive knowledge of real estate contracts to help guide you through your transaction seamlessly. She is focused on professionalism, attention to detail and commitment to always putting your needs first. What clients say they appreciate most about working with April is her patient and calming confidence yet tenacious demeanor on their behalf. She strives to demonstrate the highest level of integrity and dedication with every real estate client she works alongside.

During her downtime, she enjoys volunteering at her local animal shelter where she stays busy walking dogs and falling in love with each of them! She is happiest spending time with her husband, two daughters, three dogs and has a special place in her heart for taking time away with them at the beach in Port Aransas.

bio:
Hi there! My name is Kelsey and I've called Austin home for the last 20 years. Before landing in Texas, my family and I moved quite often (Chicago > VA > NKY > PGH > ATX), however, I always found the process of finding a new home to be an exciting journey.  Once I began studying at LSU (Geaux Tigers!), I quickly realized there were two career avenues I was passionate about — event planning and real estate.

After returning to Austin from LSU, I jumped into the event planning arena where I spent the next decade building out experiential marketing events for Austin’s notorious SXSW festival and traveling the world with Indeed’s Global Events team.  In 2020, my husband and I started a new home building business, which ultimately helped me realize it was finally time to fully dive into the world of real estate after many exciting years planning events and gaining an immense appreciation and love for all the things that make Austin unique and special.
 
My goal as your dedicated real estate expert is to help you get what you want and provide an enjoyable and seamless experience with as little stress as possible. My passion is delivering authenticity, honesty and a light-hearted energy to the home buying and selling process. I promise to provide exceptional service and will always have your best interest in mind; whether you are buying, selling, or investing.
 
When I am not working, you will typically find me chasing my two little boys around, enjoying happy hour and live music with family and friends, or simply snuggling up to binge-watch a TV series with my husband.

Mason is a highly experienced real estate broker with over a decade of expertise in the Houston market. Starting his career in 2014 right out of high school, Mason has built a reputation for excellence, working with both buyers and sellers in Houston’s most desirable neighborhoods, including Midtown, Montrose, Washington Heights, Piney Point, River Oaks, The Heights, and the Texas Medical Center area.
With a strong entrepreneurial background, Mason founded HTX Frames, a successful custom picture framing shop in Montrose, showcasing his business acumen and commitment to exceptional customer service. His expertise in marketing, negotiations, and strategic planning ensures that every client receives a seamless and successful real estate experience.

Beyond real estate, Mason has a passion for stock trading, marketing, and sports such as pickleball and volleyball. His dedication to health and fitness reflects his disciplined and goal-oriented approach, both professionally and personally.

Whether assisting first-time homebuyers, seasoned investors, or sellers looking for top-dollar results, Mason is committed to delivering outstanding service and expert guidance in Houston’s dynamic real estate market.

bio:
I’m a native Central Texan. My family and I planted our roots in the Bastrop area, and we're loving every moment of it. As a husband and proud father of four, our days are filled with family joy and envisioning the legacy we're crafting for our little ones.

Beyond my roles as a devoted husband and proud father, you'll often find me pursuing my passions during my free time. Whether it's navigating the fairways of the golf course, immersing myself in the thrill of hunting, or lending a helping hand at my local church through volunteering, I believe in a well-rounded life that encompasses both family and personal interests.

Professionally, my career in sales has molded me into a driven, service-minded, and relationship-focused individual. In a world where the bottom line often takes precedence, I humbly strive to be the antithesis of profit-over-people. I bring this ethos into my work, valuing connections and prioritizing the needs and dreams of individuals over mere transactions.

It would be my honor to be a part of your journey, whether you're buying or selling. Let's connect, have a conversation, and explore how I can best support you in achieving your real estate goals. Feel free to reach out, and together, we can create a path towards your vision of home and community.

bio:
Dina Dillard has built her company by recognizing the current real estate sales process is flawed.
Any realtor can subscribe to a MLS service and send you listings, and any potential buyer can find properties by doing their own internet search. There is no way to differentiate value when you can do the same thing as your “realtor.”

Dina and her team do not rely on internet search engine optimization (SEO) referrals. They believe in a collaborative approach where they will work with you to understand your personal needs. Depending on your specific preferences, they can offer transactional advice, assistance on real estate valuation , non-traditional financing, home improvement projects and provide you with competent suggestions for other professionals as part of their service commitment. She is a tenacious client representative.

Dina is locally born and raised. She grew up here, so she has witnessed the evolution of the Austin Metro real estate market. She will continue to be a fixture in the community, and she is looking forward to serving you.

With over six years of experience helping clients buy and sell homes in the Austin Metro area, I pride myself on being a Realtor with a heart.

For me, Real Estate is not just about transactions—it’s about building lasting relationships and understanding the unique needs and dreams of each client. Whether you're a first-time homebuyer, a luxury property seeker, or relocating to this vibrant city, I’m here to guide you through every step of the process.

My approach is rooted in empathy, integrity, and a genuine desire to help you find the perfect home. I take the time to listen, offer expert advice, and ensure you feel confident in making one of the most important decisions of your life.

Austin’s dynamic neighborhoods and growing communities make it an exciting place to call home, and I’m dedicated to helping you find your place in this wonderful city! I’m here to provide a personalized, stress-free experience—so you can focus on what matters most: turning your vision of home into a reality.

bio:
For native Austinite, Rusty Douglass, helping his clients buy or sell their dream home is an incredibly rewarding process. From first-time homebuyers to seasoned investors and everything in between, there isn’t a real estate challenge that Rusty won’t dive into with determination and passion.

If there's a secret to his success, it's a quick understanding of the unique needs of each client - buyer or seller. His honest ability to form a bond of instant trust makes him an invaluable ally in any successful home transaction. Individual attention is considered crucial so when you work with Rusty, you get Rusty. He prefers to do his own property showings and his personal approach to business is characterized by impeccable professionalism mixed with warmth, class and humor.

When not selling homes Rusty enjoys spending time with his wife, Ashley and bernedoogle, Chili. Rusty loves live music, exploring new restaurants, staying active, and all of the quirky characters that make Austin such a great place to live!

bio:
Andie's journey into real estate was sparked by a desire to make a meaningful impact on people's lives during one of their most significant life transitions, and a genuine passion for helping others find not just houses, but homes that resonate with their unique lifestyles and aspirations.

Growing up, Andie has always been inspired by the ability communities have to tell a story about what life in that community is like. Andie moved to Austin in 2015 to pursue a Bachelor's, and subsequently a Master's degree, in Community and Regional Planning from UT (hook 'em!). Austin has felt like home to Andie since she moved here, and she enjoys the bustling arts and culture, and health and fitness scenes.

Andie's clients benefit from her real estate expertise and gain insight into the vibrant culture and hidden gems that make Austin a truly exceptional place to call home. Her deep connection to the community and understanding of Austin's zoning and municipal plans fuels her commitment to assisting clients in discovering a home.

What sets Andie apart is her unwavering dedication to continuous learning. She recognizes that the real estate landscape is ever-evolving, and staying informed about market trends, innovative technologies, and legal intricacies is crucial to providing top-notch service.

Andie is also dedicated to tailoring her services to meet each client's unique goals. Her attention to detail, excellent communication skills, and a knack for problem-solving make the home-buying or selling process a seamless and enjoyable experience.

Andie is not just committed to finding you a house, but is excited and dedicated to helping you build your dream home here in Austin!

bio:
Buying or selling a home isn’t just a deal—it’s a major life change. I’m grateful to walk alongside my clients through every step of that journey with honesty, empathy, clear communication, and a tireless commitment to their goals. My mission is to make the process not only manageable but truly rewarding, offering tailored guidance and focusing on every important detail along the way.

Before starting my career, I spent a year and a half overseas on mission work, which taught me to build relationships across cultures, listen deeply, and serve with empathy and patience—skills I bring to every client interaction. Early on, I built my business from the ground up, one conversation, one open house, and one client at a time, earning trust and forming lasting relationships.Whether you’re a first-time buyer, relocating, upgrading, or downsizing I’m dedicated to guiding clients confidently through the market, making homeownership exciting, empowering, and stress-free.

bio:
Born and raised in Austin, I grew up in Westlake and graduated from St. Edward’s University. After college, I dove into Austin’s tech and startup scene, spending time at Capital Factory and working alongside some of the city’s most innovative entrepreneurs. That experience sharpened my problem-solving skills and built the foundation for how I approach real estate today—with creativity, strategy, and a deep understanding of Austin’s growth.

Since 2021, I’ve helped clients navigate Austin’s fast-moving real estate market, from first-time homebuyers and investors to renters looking for the right apartment. My goal is simple: make the process seamless while advocating fiercely for my clients’ best interests.

When I’m not working with clients, you’ll probably find me outdoors—rock climbing at the Greenbelt, wake surfing on Lake Travis, or cooling off at Barton Springs. I also love traveling to remote national parks and exploring new climbing destinations.

I’m passionate about shaping Austin’s future while honoring its roots, and I bring that same energy to every client relationship. Whether you’re buying, selling, or renting, I’ll help you find your place in this city I’ve always called home.

bio:
Katie Evans, a Licensed Realtor with over eight years of experience, has established a notable career in real estate, marked by the successful sale of over 200 houses. Her professional journey, which spans various states including Montana, Colorado, Florida, and Washington, has provided her with a broad perspective on diverse property markets. Since making Austin, TX, her home in 2011, Katie has developed an extensive knowledge of the area, having lived in seven different zip codes.

Katie's academic background in psychological science from Montana State University has been pivotal in honing her strong negotiation skills, enabling her to advocate effectively for her clients’ interests. Combined with her proficiency in data analytics, Katie offers insightful market analysis and data-driven decision-making strategies to her clients. Her experience as a finance manager further equips her with a comprehensive understanding of the financial aspects of real estate transactions.

In addition to her professional achievements, Katie also manages a successful lakefront short-term rental property in Wisconsin, a venture she undertakes with her fiancé Shaun. This personal experience in property management and investment adds a practical dimension to her array of skills. Known for her meticulous attention to detail and organizational capabilities, Katie excels in handling a variety of real estate transactions, including those involving investment properties.

At the heart of Katie's practice is her commitment to understanding and prioritizing her clients' needs. She is dedicated to ensuring her clients are well-informed and confident in their real estate decisions. Katie's goal is to empower her clients with the knowledge and support necessary to navigate the real estate market successfully.

bio:
I’m a dedicated Real Estate Broker with a passion for serving my community and helping individuals achieve their real estate dreams. Armed with a Bachelor's degree in Business and the proud status of a US Army Veteran, I bring a unique blend of discipline, commitment, and business acumen to the real estate industry.

As the President of the North Lake Chamber of Commerce, I actively contribute to the growth and prosperity of my local community. This leadership role allows me to connect with businesses, foster partnerships, and drive positive change.

Within the realm of real estate, I proudly collaborate with my two accomplished daughters, creating a family-owned venture that thrives on serving the unique needs of our clients. Our areas of expertise encompass working with veterans, assisting first-time homebuyers, guiding sellers through the process, facilitating relocations, and advising investors.

With over two decades of living in the heart of Central Texas, I possess an intimate understanding of the local market. I'm well-versed in residential properties and have a deep expertise in farm and ranch properties. What truly fuels my passion for this work is the opportunity to help individuals invest in themselves. There's nothing more rewarding than playing a role in someone's journey towards homeownership, helping them build their future, and watching them take those first steps towards paying their own mortgage instead of someone else's.

When you choose to work with us, you become part of our Salazar Real Estate Family, and our commitment extends far beyond the closing day. Let's team up and turn your real estate aspirations into a reality. Whether you're buying, selling, or investing, we are here to guide you every step of the way.

bio: Caroline, a native Texan, has been helping homebuyers and sellers since 2020. After college she ventured to Los Angeles and, after a few years in motion picture production, she came back to the Lone Star State with her husband Jude en tow. After stints with SXSW and the Austin Film Society, she pivoted to another lifelong passion: real estate! After going through the process herself, she knew she could bring everything she’s learned through her varied career and tie it into helping others with the biggest purchase of their lives. When she’s not helping her clients find their dream homes you can find her exploring Austin, cheering on TCU, or chasing around her girls: Phoebe (human, 2) and Daphne (pug, 6).

bio:
Jeremy, a Native Texan and entrepreneur at heart, is a Platinum Producer and Team Leader at Spyglass Realty in Austin, Texas. With over $80 million in sales and a remarkable track record of launching and stabilizing over $1 billion in luxury mixed-use communities throughout Austin, Jeremy has solidified his reputation as a leading figure in the real estate industry.


Holding a degree in Business from Concordia University of Texas, Jeremy combines his passion for real estate with the strategic skills he honed while working with large corporations. He now channels that expertise to serve his clients, friends, and family, guided by his core belief: "Everybody deserves to be a homeowner and investor. It's what I do."


As a member of exclusive networks like the Austin Luxury Network and Clubhouse Commission.co, Jeremy has unparalleled access to both on-market and off-market luxury properties, giving his clients a competitive edge in Austin’s dynamic real estate market. His dedication to mentorship and leadership ensures his team at Spyglass Realty delivers exceptional service, making him a trusted guide for those navigating the path to homeownership or investment.


Whether you're seeking a luxury property or exploring investment opportunities, Jeremy’s proven success and client-focused approach make him the go-to realtor in Austin.

bio:

bio:
Rob is a first-generation homegrown Austinite! He graduated from Texas State in 2012, with a degree in business Marketing. After college, he started in the healthcare sales industry and moved to El Paso to serve both the West Texas and New Mexico diverse cultural communities for their health insurance wants. After consecutive years of being the top sales agent in high-volume Medicare sales, he relocated to Dallas to help expand and serve the Dallas/Fort Worth health markets.


In 2016, he decided to pursue another calling in life by helping communities at a larger scale. Rob decided to live abroad for the next 4 years in both China and Costa Rica, so he could widen his scope of the world. He taught both English Language Arts to international elementary students and helped them develop their skills using the English language. As well as, Business English to adult students to help them grow their business by educating them to develop and expand for interviews, international team projects, and working with bilingual clients.


Since returning home and seeing how much the Austin area has evolved into a multicultural community, Rob understands the importance of communication now more than ever. Understanding real estate at times can feel the same as learning a new language. Rob easily guides his clients through the whole real estate process, from the first meeting, all the way to closing with key in hand and beyond. Rob makes it his mission to understand and assist all of his clients in achieving their dreams and future promises of owning and investing in real estate all around The Austin Metroplex as well its surrounding cities. He is disciplined about staying educated and current in the city’s ever growing and evolving real estate market. Rob’s Mantra is that “The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.” So, dream beautifully and believe that he will be there to help you find a piece of your future that you want to create.

bio:
Native to Austin, Texas, I bring over seven years of real estate experience shaped by deep community roots and a lifelong passion for service. After graduating college, I dedicated my career to helping prominent Austin business owners grow and refine their brands; an experience that taught me the power of vision, connection, and trust.

My family is known throughout Austin for our legacy of service through our beloved restaurants, Casa Garcia, and our ongoing commitment to preserving the city’s historic charm through our restoration businesses. These early influences instilled in me a strong sense of pride in our city’s heritage and a genuine desire to help others invest in Austin’s future.

Today, I specialize in guiding clients through every stage of their real estate journey; from selecting the perfect home to identifying opportunities that build long-term financial security. I approach each relationship with the utmost discretion, integrity, and attention to detail, ensuring a seamless and personalized experience that reflects the best of Austin living.

Outside of real estate, I am proud to support United Way and Austin Pets Alive, organizations that mirror my commitment to community and compassion. My goal is simple: to provide exceptional service grounded in integrity while helping my clients build beautiful lives and lasting legacies in the city I’m proud to call home.

bio:
A former Semi-Pro Basketball Player, Cederick Harris knows that being on the winning team takes skill, commitment and a powerful knowledge of the game – in basketball and in the Real Estate Industry.

Meet Cederick Harris: Cederick knows all aspects of the real estate industry. With a background in sales, investments, construction, development, lending and teaching he helps his clients make decisions based on a measurable set of goals. With a reputation for honesty and integrity, Cederick offers his clients the chance to work with a winning team and to score in the competitive arena of Austin real estate.

Cederick Harris has an extra-value advantage. He has lived in Austin for 43 years and knows the area better than most. He has watched as the city has grown and changed, with the influx of newcomers and new businesses, over the past few years. He knows how projected growth will impact each area and uses that knowledge along with his business education to help clients score in the mortgage industry.

Cederick is a licensed Real Estate Broker and Residential Mortgage Loan Originator. His career grew out of his own interest of building and flipping homes, and he soon realized that his knowledge would be invaluable in helping others. “My clients trust me with one of the most important decisions of their lifetime and I honor and respect that.” Being a part of real estate investment groups puts Cederick in a powerful position to help clients. His understanding of Return on Investment, working with loan originators, home warranty companies, builders, contractors, title companies and inspectors are important keys in helping clients with complex transactions.

Read Cederick's full bio here.

bio:
Since 1999, I have lived in and explored just about every neighborhood in Austin. After earning my BA in communications in 2002, I embarked on a career which has spanned the entire spectrum of real estate, particularly real estate in Austin. In fact my first experiences in real estate began as a young man working alongside my father building homes in south Texas.

Since 2004, I've worked in the various aspects of real estate starting as a loan consultant, rising to the vice president in charge of training. This position allowed me to pursue a passion of mine: interacting with and helping other people. When an even better opportunity arose to follow that passion, I jumped at that chance, becoming a wholesale mortgage account executive. This position allowed me to work with many of Austin's great brokers and learn about the inner workings of mortgages and what happens after purchases and refinances close. In the heat of doing quite a bit of business, this knowledge allowed me to see the looming black cloud coming down, with all the programs other banks were offering, and seeing firsthand so many loan officers abuse loopholes as well as their own clients. I just couldn't believe what I was seeing; this isn't why I was in real estate.

Wanting to get back to working to get individual families into the homes of their dreams, I began working with one of Austin's elite real estate companies as the Marketing and IT Director. During this time, I took the opportunity to advance my knowledge of search engine optimization and web development. Day to day, I was responsible for creating marketing plans and ads for some of the most talented real estate agents in Austin.

With my previous experience and working closely with these agents I was fortunate enough to learn the keys to successfully market and sell properties, from the high end luxury homes of Westlake to modest family homes, to even Austin's unique downtown properties.

This path I've traveled has left me with contacts across that spectrum of real estate and mortgages, a knowledge base which makes me uniquely suited to handle whatever issues may arise, whether it be mortgage related, or just a desire for that perfectly unique home.

Being a naturalized Austinite, I have a passion for the history of the state, particularly for Austin. Each day I strive to learn something yet undiscovered. I currently live in north Austin with my partner, Lea since 2020, my two stepsons, and our dog, Marley. At 17, I was one of the youngest Park Rangers for Texas Parks and Wildlife, serving at Kickapoo Caverns and Devil's Sinkhole State Natural Areas in central Texas, which left me with an extensive knowledge and passion for all the plants and animals that keep us company here in the great state of Texas. Anytime I’m not doing real estate, you will find me either fly fishing on a local lake, river or on my boat at the coast or at the local animal shelter.

So anytime you want to go trouncing around in the wilderness, please feel free to call me! And if you feel like buying a piece of it, you can call me for that too! I'm always happy to help!

bio: Alli grew up in Encinitas, California. Her fondest memories included surfing and having bonfires with family and friends on the beach. She is the oldest of 4. Alli is in her 6th year of real estate. Her passion developed from a young age, where she spent countless weekends going on listing appointments with her father. Alli specializes in working with first-time homebuyers, as well as the niche market of investors and multi-family complexes. Last year alone, Alli did $12.2 million in volume. She bought her first house in 2019 in East Austin, has continued to watch it grow and change. When Alli is not working, she is planning her next out of country trip. She spends a lot of time with her family and friends trying out Austin’s newest restaurants.

bio:
As a second-generation real estate broker, Jen Helmig grew up learning the business from her high-performing, high-volume broker mother. Her passion for learning led her to earn a BA in Business Administration, followed by an MBA—and she's currently finishing her PhD in Psychology/Theology.

Before diving back into real estate, Jen owned and operated multiple successful gyms and Crossfits in San Diego, sharpening her business acumen and competitive edge. In 2015, her heart brought her back to where it all began—real estate.

A recognized top-producing agent in 2016-2025—and a 3X Icon Agent—Jen has built a reputation for excellence. She offers a dynamic range of services tailored to Austin’s diverse market of investors, buyers, sellers, and tenants. In 2021, Jen personally flipped 14 investment properties and built a thriving portfolio of both short- and long-term rentals. She doesn’t just sell real estate—she lives it. Jen mentors and teaches others to invest with confidence, using the same proven strategies and systems she applies in her own portfolio. 

Previously the director of JOG Real Estate, Jen also mentored agents into top producers within their first 12 months of real estate, believing that iron sharpens iron. Her commitment to collaboration and service keeps her strategies sharp and her business innovative. With years of experience, previous licenses in multiple states, and a solid academic foundation, Jen is a trusted resource.

Jen lives in North Austin with her husband—a respected local realtor and business broker—and their three kids. When she's not negotiating contracts or coaching agents, you’ll find her working out, reading, or discipling women within her community.

bio:
Hi, I’m Keren Hernandez — a proud Austin-area Realtor® who’s passionate about helping people find not just a house, but a place to truly call home. Whether you’re buying your very first home or relocating to the area, I’m here to make the process smooth, informed, and even enjoyable.

I bring local knowledge, patience, and a genuine understanding of what a major life decision buying a home can be. I take the time to get to know your goals and priorities so that we can work together to find the right fit — at the right pace.

As a fluent Spanish and English speaker, I’m able to connect with clients from a variety of backgrounds, and I love making the experience accessible and welcoming for everyone. My work is driven by strong family values and community involvement, and I truly believe that real estate is about relationships, not just transactions.

Let’s make your next move a confident and exciting one — I’d be honored to be part of your journey.

bio: Kylie is a dedicated real estate professional with six years of experience in the industry. Her passion lies in working with families and helping them find the perfect home to raise their children. Having lived in Nevada, North Carolina, and Texas, Kylie has firsthand experience with relocation and understands the nuances of moving. She has personally invested in multiple properties, both as homes and as part of her investment portfolio, giving her valuable insight into the real estate market. Kylie is widely trusted within the real estate industry and is known for her hard work and unwavering dedication. Her genuine passion for her work sets her apart, and she is committed to creating a positive impact both professionally and personally. In addition to her professional accomplishments, Kylie is an active member of the PTA at her daughter's school and plays an active role in her community. Family is at the core of Kylie's life, with her husband Tom and two children, Sophie and Maverick. Together, they enjoy discovering new family-friendly spots, especially those near water. bio:
Michael believes success is driven by consistent action. He recognizes that the intricacies of what make a person successful must be consistently nourished and cultivated through hard work, self-discipline and ambition. It was this steadfast attitude and committed way of thinking that first lead him to a career in the NFL, and later to pursue his real estate license. As a native Houstonian with deep connections in the communities he serves, Michael offers an unparalleled understanding of the ever-evolving market here. He is well equipped with the work ethic and knowledge necessary to confidently guide his clients through the very important and sometimes challenging process of buying or selling a home. He is motivated by doing all he can to help his clients actualize their dreams, and stands by the idea that the only thing tougher than developing leadership skills is attempting to be successful without them, so he strives daily to be the best educator and motivator he can be.

"Earning my clients' trust and helping them begin a new chapter is an amazing feeling," he says. "I'm grateful to see their smiling faces at the conclusion of a sale and know that I played a part in helping someone get to where they wanted to be." When he isn't busy showing homes, negotiating contracts, or running comps, you can usually find him at the gym or hanging out with his 9 year old son, Daniel. He's committed to a healthy lifestyle and says his most important role in life is being Daniel's role model.

bio:
John Hidrogo was born and raised in the beautiful city of Austin, Texas. Growing up in this vibrant and dynamic community, he developed a deep love for the area and its unique real estate market. With an intimate understanding of the local neighborhoods, schools, and amenities, John is your go-to expert when it comes to navigating the Austin real estate scene.

John's journey as a real estate agent is rooted in his desire to make a positive impact on people's lives. After completing his service in the United States Marine Corps, John transitioned seamlessly into the world of real estate, bringing with him the same commitment and dedication he displayed during his military career.

John's military background has instilled in him a strong work ethic, attention to detail, and a deep sense of integrity. He understands the importance of listening to his clients' needs and goes above and beyond to ensure their goals are met. Whether you are a first-time homebuyer, an experienced investor, or looking to sell your property, John is equipped with the knowledge, resources, and negotiating skills to deliver exceptional results.

Beyond his professional achievements, John is a loving father to his daughter, Pricilla Hidrogo. As a family man, he understands the significance of finding the perfect home for your loved ones and creating lasting memories. John's genuine care for his clients is evident in his personalized approach, where he takes the time to understand their unique circumstances and guide them through every step of the real estate process.

When he's not assisting clients, John enjoys training and raising his yellow Labrador and PTSD Service Dog, Remi “Lil Chef” Johnson, to share with the kids at the children hospital and elderly homes. He also enjoys exploring the great outdoors, immersing himself in Austin's vibrant arts and music scene, and giving back to his community. His dedication to service extends beyond his military service, as he actively participates in local charities and initiatives, working to make Austin an even better place to call home.

If you're looking for a real estate agent who combines expertise, integrity, and a personalized touch, John Hidrogo is here to help. Contact him today to begin your journey towards finding your dream home or achieving your real estate goals.

bio:
I’ve always been a nomad at heart. Born in Houston, Texas, by the time I was 10, I had already lived in seven cities across three countries. Those early experiences taught me the value of community, connection, and embracing change. Fast forward to today—I'm a full-time real estate advisor with 14 years of experience in beautiful Central Texas. My mission? To make your buying or selling journey as fun, easy, and stress-free as possible. Change doesn’t have to be hard! Whether you’re a first-time buyer, empty-nester, or investor growing your profitable real estate portfolio, I’m here to guide you every step of the way.

As a mom, grandma, and former educator, I’m a natural at offering guidance. After an intake meeting to understand your goals and motivations, we’ll craft a course of action that considers your goals and the current market. When the market conditions match your goals, it's time to “Start packing!” I'll ask all the questions: Is this the right time? House? Location? What about the roof, foundation, insurance, taxes, utility districts? We'll cover everything from the HOA to the location of the nearest H-E-B! I'll manage the details of the contract, contingencies and negotiations (my favorite part!), so you can focus on packing or planning your next investment.

Here’s a favorite piece of advice I share with clients: “You make your money when you buy, not when you sell.” If that speaks to you, let’s talk! And if you’re curious about what it means, I’d be happy to explain. Schedule a call, and let’s start your journey together!

bio:
Lauren is a passionate and client driven Realtor with the Spyglass Realty team. She has called Austin, Tx home for over 20 years and has experienced Austin living in most all of the city’s neighborhoods. After spending the majority of her life and planting roots in Central Texas she knows all the amazing features and opportunities Austin and its surrounding areas have to offer and loves to share that knowledge with her clients to help them find the perfect home and neighborhood that will suit their needs. Prior to making the jump into the real estate industry, Lauren spent 15 years in the hair and makeup industry as an imaginative, adaptable, and dynamic hairstylist & make-up artist with a passion for transforming self-image & confidence. She led teams as a salon manager, worked in high pressure situations on set for photoshoots and movies, and was tenacious in securing new business & forging dedicated, loyal relationships with clients and business partners. She now brings her unwavering love for understanding and helping people to her real estate career.

“I pride myself on my ability to truly listen and understand my clients cares and concerns, especially when it comes to making a major life decision, like home buying. Purchasing a new home can be an overwhelming or scary experience for some and my goal is to make the experience fun, and ease the mind of my clients by having open communication and showing all my clients the respect and attention they deserve!”

Lauren is dedicated to helping you with your next real estate adventure, whether it be buying, selling, or leasing a property, she wants to help you find your personal sanctuary!

Delivering first-class service is my highest priority. I take great pride in earning your trust as we navigate the home buying and selling process together. As your agent, I am committed to giving you honesty, integrity, and value throughout our partnership. Since 2015, I’ve had the privilege of assisting clients in achieving their homeownership dreams, and as a proud native Houstonian, I bring local expertise to every step of the process. bio: Working in residential real estate for my clients is an absolute passion, and I pride myself on being incredibly knowledgeable about every nook, cranny and enclave in the greater Austin area, from Georgetown to San Marcos! I love people, and I find it a joy to work towards the realization of someone’s goals. Whether it’s balancing the sale of a current home with the search for a forever home, the electric excitement of a first-time home purchase, the addition or liquidation of an investment property to a portfolio or any other reason under the sun, I revel in being able to facilitate an easy, memorable and fun (that’s right!) journey from point A to point B for every person I work with, and transform clients to friends on every transaction. In working with buyers to navigate this incredibly fluid and competitive Austin market, I make it a point to provide every piece of information necessary to make the right decisions for my clients’ particular situation. From detailed market and appreciation analysis of a prospective home, transparently walking clients through the details of each sale contract and communicating the finer points of a transaction in a way that is easily understood, I empower my people with the confidence of knowledge to make the right choices to achieve their goals in real estate and building wealth for themselves and their families. In specializing with my sellers, I love to strategize on the best ways to take full advantage of what this incredible Austin real estate market can do for them. From building marketability for a property, managing the pre-sale to-do lists, getting the home ready to list, and dazzling my clients with myriad marketing techniques, I always position my sellers to net the maximum amount of profit possible from their property and to manage the transaction smoothly from initial offer to closing table. When I’m not working with my clients, you will find me playing music, obsessing over vintage guitars, discussing the merits of the latest and greatest movies, cheering for my alma mater, UCLA, wrangling my absolutely brilliant children and spending time with my wonderful wife.

bio:
John moved to Austin in 2018. As a 17-year global banker in the CFO space, John’s expertise in economics and data analytics provide him a strong basis for connecting with his real estate clients in the sale or purchase of their luxury home and exceeding their expectations in delivering results.

John was first bitten by the real estate bug when he sold and invested in real estate in South Florida to pay his way through University of Miami MBA school.

His time then spent as a business unit CFO instilled in him a great passion for optimizing results and serving his clients' best interests.

Building and leading Standard Chartered Bank's Global Finance Center in Tianjin, China imparted in him a great love of mentoring up and coming professionals and servant leadership.

John brings this same leadership to the team of title, mortgage (as needed) and other professionals required to successfully complete his client’s sale or purchase of their home.

Since 2018 John has been serving clients in the sale or purchase of their homes in Austin, Texas.

John and his wife Hao Wang Kossler are food, wine and travel enthusiasts. His greatest joy in life is spending time together with his wife Hao.

With four years of experience in real estate, I’ve had the privilege of closing over 30 transactions, including houses, condos, tracts of land, and commercial properties. Growing up in Spicewood, TX, just down the road from Willie Nelson’s Luck Ranch, I developed a deep appreciation for the unique character and charm of Central Texas.

My passion for real estate was inspired by my brother, a mentor with over 20 years in the industry, who guided me into this career. His influence, combined with my background in event production and film production, has shaped my approach—blending creativity, attention to detail, and strong negotiation skills to deliver exceptional results for my clients.

bio:
An Austinite since 1990, I am well versed in both current and historic real estate trends, and understand how changes in the Austin business environment, property development, and the mortgage industry can impact the decision to buy, sell, or hold, whether you are a first time home buyer, seasoned real estate investor or someplace in-between. I routinely contribute to several local real estate forums and have taught both beginner and advanced real estate investing courses. My past sales experience in Austin’s highly competitive technology sector has made me a formidable yet ethical negotiator, and my tenacity and integrity routinely earn me loyalty and referrals from both sides of the closing table. The Austinologist is an established, growing team with the sole focus of providing the best possible total customer experience, and our team members boast diverse backgrounds from sales management to business ownership. We are plugged in to all facets of the Austin real estate scene, and are able to leverage relationships with lenders, appraisers, inspectors, contractors, and investors.

bio:
My passion for real estate began at the age of 22, when I purchased my first investment property. That experience opened my eyes to how lucrative, exciting, and multifaceted real estate truly is—and it sparked a lifelong commitment to building my career in this dynamic industry.

Since then, I have dedicated myself to helping friends, family, and referral clients successfully purchase their dream homes and investment properties. I take great pride in guiding clients through both residential and commercial real estate transactions, including retail and office expansions, land development opportunities, and multifamily rental investment properties, which I find particularly rewarding.

Every client and every property is unique, and that is what excites me most. No two transactions are ever the same, and with each deal, my respect, appreciation, and enthusiasm for real estate continues to grow.

I am deeply committed to providing my clients with exceptional knowledge, strategic guidance, unwavering support, and a high level of professionalism. Through continual growth and market expertise, my goal is to empower my clients to make confident, informed decisions in what is often one of the most significant investments of their lives.

Primarily she has focused on her expertise in the property tax industry, going on 6 years handling thousands of protests throughout Texas.

bio:
Josh Marks is a Texas Real Estate Broker, investor, and team leader based in the heart of Houston, where he lives with his wife and two children. A proud graduate of the University of Louisiana–Lafayette, Josh brings a strong business foundation to his work, having launched his professional career in the Oil & Gas industry in 2011. By 2015, he played an instrumental role in establishing and scaling a Houston branch for a private company, helping it grow to nearly 40 employees.

In 2019, Josh made a strategic pivot into real estate, quickly earning a reputation as a trusted Realtor and advisor. By 2022, he shifted his focus from solo production to building a team of dedicated Realtors while also expanding into real estate investing. Throughout his journey, Josh has personally mentored and trained several independent agents, helping them grow their businesses with confidence and clarity.

Josh holds a Texas Real Estate Broker license and has successfully managed more than 80 transactions, with property values ranging from $100,000 to approximately $5.3 million. He specializes in luxury residential real estate across Houston’s most prestigious inner-city neighborhoods, offering unmatched local insight and market expertise.

In addition to representing buyers and sellers, Josh is deeply involved in locating high-potential investment opportunities, flipping properties, and managing a growing portfolio of short-term rentals. With a forward-thinking vision for growth, he also plans to expand into luxury new construction and development—creating high-end inventory for his clients and valuable lead-generation opportunities for his team.

Known for his professionalism, hands-on leadership, and results-driven approach, Josh continues to position himself and his team at the forefront of Houston’s dynamic real estate market.

bio:
A licensed Realtor® since 2009, Dora Martinez is a top-performing listing agent with a proven track record of selling hundreds of new construction and resale homes across Austin. As a true Austin native, she brings unmatched local insight into the city’s diverse neighborhoods and ever-evolving market—giving her clients a strategic edge when it comes to pricing, staging, and negotiating top-dollar offers.

Known for her authentic approach and client-first mindset, Dora has built her business entirely through referrals and word-of-mouth. Whether working with first-time sellers, seasoned investors, or luxury homeowners, she’s committed to delivering a seamless, results-driven experience from start to finish. Her extensive network of trusted local lenders, inspectors, and title professionals ensures every transaction moves efficiently and transparently.

Dora’s experience spans residential homes, condos, and high-end properties, with a strong presence in East Austin, Central Austin and Round Rock, where she resides. She began her career in new construction sales for a boutique homebuilder that she co-owned, which laid the foundation for her deep industry knowledge and high-touch service.

In 2013, Dora was honored as one of NAHREP’s "Top 10 Elite Latinos of Real Estate"—a recognition of her impact and dedication to the Austin real estate community.

When she’s not working, you’ll find Dora reading, traveling, exploring the newest eateries Austin has to offer, or spending quality time with her children.

professionalTitle: Realtor® | Accredited Buyer Representative (ABR®) | Planning & Zoning Commissioner
bio:
Hi, I’m Caitlin McLean—born and raised in Williamson County, and proud to call this incredible community home. With over six years of experience in real estate, I bring deep local expertise, a strong client-first approach, and a commitment to excellence in every transaction.

Before launching my real estate career, I worked closely with Veterans, a role that instilled in me the importance of trust, service, and clear communication—values I carry into every client relationship today. I’m also honored to serve as an active Planning and Zoning Commissioner for the City of Jarrell, where I help shape the future of our growing community.

I hold the Accredited Buyer Representative (ABR®) designation, awarded by the National Association of Realtors, and was proudly named Best of Georgetown in both 2021 and 2022—a reflection of my dedication to client satisfaction and market knowledge.

Whether you’re a first-time homebuyer, seasoned investor, or looking to sell, I’m here to help you navigate every step of the process with confidence and care. Outside of work, I’m a wife and mom of two energetic boys, and I know just how important it is to find not just a house, but a home. I’d be honored to help you find yours.

bio: With over 25 years of professional leadership and customer service experience, I’ve learned that real estate is about much more than just a transaction—it’s about building a solid financial future. I take a systems-based approach to every deal, ensuring my clients have the infrastructure and strategies they need to protect their investment from day one. I believe the universe bends to tenacity, and whether I’m analyzing market data or helping a neighbor, I bring that same relentless energy and genuine care to everything I do. A place I’m proud to call home!
