He is excited about the opportunity to work with you and looks forward to helping you successfully buy or sell your home.

bio:
Meet Megan Miller – a proud Austin native, fifth-generation Texan, and trusted real estate guide with deep roots in Central Texas.

Megan isn’t just here to help you buy or sell a home, she’s here to help you find your place. Whether you're planting roots for the first time, leveling up to your dream home, or searching for the right slice of land to build your future, Megan brings a calm, confident presence and a wealth of local knowledge to every step of the process.

With a background in residential, new construction, vacant land, and farm & ranch properties, Megan offers more than just market expertise, she brings the kind of insight only a true Austin insider can. She understands the nuances of each neighborhood, from emerging suburbs to tucked-away hill country gems, and she loves helping clients discover where they feel most at home.

Her style? Honest, strategic, and refreshingly down-to-earth. Megan is known for her strong communication, savvy negotiations, and the ability to make even the most complex transaction feel simple and smooth. She’s the agent clients come back to—and refer—because she treats each relationship with care and each home like it’s her own.

Now back with Spyglass Realty, Megan is excited to continue serving buyers, sellers, and dreamers alike, whether you’re a lifelong Austinite or just getting to know this vibrant corner of Texas.

Ready to explore what’s next? Megan is here to guide you every step of the way!

bio:
Buying or selling a home in Austin is not just about posting photos and hoping for the best. It is about having an actual plan.

I am Austin Moore, a Realtor with over five years of experience helping people navigate a market that is always changing. My approach is simple. Be honest, be strategic, and do not waste your time.
Every home is different. Some need light prep and strong pricing. Others need creative marketing, neighbor outreach, or targeted digital exposure. My job is to figure out what actually moves the needle for your specific situation, not recycle the same playbook and call it custom.

Clients know me for being straightforward, highly responsive, and easy to work with. I will tell you the truth, even when it is not what you want to hear, explain your options in plain English, and keep things moving without making the process miserable.

When I am not working, you will usually find me on a golf course, where a surprising number of my clients first met me. I live in South Austin, work all over the metro, and enjoy helping people make smart moves with confidence and fewer gray hairs.

bio:
Hi, I'm Jocelyn Tran Morales.

Originally from Michigan and proud to call Texas home for the past 12 years, I bring a deep love for the Lone Star State and a genuine passion for helping families find their perfect place here. My journey from Houston to Austin has shaped not only where I live—but how I serve: with heart, dedication, and a strong commitment to results. 

With a background in finance and the milestone of purchasing my first home at just 21, I understand the importance of making smart, informed decisions and protecting your investment every step of the way. I’m also committed to continuous growth and staying on the cutting edge of real estate technology—so my clients always have an advantage in today’s competitive market.

Before real estate, I spent over nine years as a general manager, leading high-performing teams and building lasting relationships. These leadership skills now fuel my client-first approach, where clear communication and dependable service are key to every transaction.

My husband, Javier, and I are proud parents to two handsome boys, Cristiano and Ryan. As a mom, I know just how important it is to find a home that truly fits your family’s needs. Whether you’re a first-time buyer, relocating, or upgrading, I’m here to ensure your real estate journey is smooth, supportive, and successful.

I’m also proud to serve clients in both English and Vietnamese—making the home buying and selling process more accessible and comfortable for even more families.

Let’s find your dream home—and make Texas feel like home for you, too.

bio: After being raised in Lubbock and studying Finance and Real Estate at Texas Tech, I made a great decision to move to Austin. I come from a background of commercial real estate, spending time as a commercial real estate appraiser for TCAD and also as an analyst and investment sales agent for a large commercial retail brokerage so I understand the numbers and what it means to make an investment in a given market. However, I love the people side of things and just what an investment really is with residential... a home. A place to come to after work where you can relax and be most comfortable. A place to raise and have children. A place to entertain, and show off. It's so many things but most importantly, it's your thing and I can't wait to be the person to facilitate that. I am passionate about many things, and real estate is one of them. When I'm not working on real estate related matters, I enjoy DJing, consulting with people on their businesses and startups (I've had a couple of my own), looking at investments, being active in the form of running, basketball, and skateboarding, and spending time with friends. Looking forward to meeting you.

bio:
My first priority when meeting with you, is YOU. I want to get to know you and determine how to best help you by carefully listening to you. Everyone has different needs and wants and everyone works differently, I want to make sure we are doing things YOUR way, while still protecting you and ensuring your needs are always put first.

I consider each transaction a relationship, this is important to me and should be to you when working with anyone on such a large transaction.

I pride myself on providing constant and open communication to you and all parties involved in your transaction. I commit to being available to answer your questions and provide all the information you need, never assuming you know the next step, keeping you updated before you have to ask. 

I’ve assisted buyers from first time to their forever home, sellers, re-locators, vacation homes, distressed homeowners in need of a short sale, and savvy investors

To every client, I have the opportunity to assist, I offer my full attention, experience, certified negotiating skills, marketing and home staging knowledge, honesty and integrity.

I am a native Austinite so you can rest assured I am very familiar with all the areas in and around the Greater Austin Area and I look forward to a long term relationship with you as your trusted Real Estate Advisor in all your endeavors.

With a strong background in construction and new-build projects, Drew brings a builder’s eye to every transaction helping clients understand not only what a home offers today, but how it’s built, improved, and positioned for long-term value.

Originally relocating from Canada, Drew has firsthand experience navigating the complexities families face when moving everything from timing and logistics to schools, neighborhoods, and settling into a new community. This perspective allows her to guide relocating clients with empathy, clarity, and a well-structured plan, making what can feel overwhelming feel organized and manageable.

Known for her calm, information-driven approach, Drew walks buyers and sellers through each step of the process with ease, transparency, and strategic insight. Whether assisting with a custom build, a resale, or a relocation-driven move, she empowers clients with the knowledge they need to make confident decisions from first showing to closing.

bio:
Billy Pate grew up in Marble Falls, TX and has lived in the hill country for the majority of his life. After graduating high school in Marble Falls, Billy moved to Austin to pursue a career in the hospitality and property management industry, which later transferred over into real estate.

At first, Billy served in the Texas Army National Guard at Camp Mabry as a Finance Specialist, then later received a degree in Hospitality Management. Billy's first foray into real estate was through working in finance and sales for home builders and triggered his passion from there. Billy enjoys working with clients and upholding his commitment to serve their best interests with everything he's got. Qualifying and identifying the needs of the client is crucial in real estate and he is excited to help in that area no matter what the need is.

Billy knows that buying or selling your home can be very stressful and is the biggest purchase in one’s life, but it can also be the most exciting. That’s exactly why he wants to be a part of the process. When Billy isn’t helping people with real estate he is spending time with family and friends. He also enjoys a lot of outdoor activities that include: Golfing, biking, kayaking, wakeboarding, and fishing. Billy is also a big fan of the live music scene in Austin which the city is so famous for!

bio:
Nikki moved to Austin in 2011 after spending her early years on her family's 2,000 acre farm in Missouri. She was awarded an academic scholarship to attend the University of Missouri and in 2008 obtained her B.S. in Design and Merchandising. The first in her family to attend college, Nikki is someone who has proven herself to be tenacious and driven, yet down-to-earth. She treats people with respect and knows how to roll up her sleeves to get the results she's seeking.

After spending a decade working in fashion retail management, she segued into account management in the tech space. Once she became a mother, she made the choice to pursue her real estate license and has been a realtor ever since. She continually educates herself on real estate topics in order to stay on top of Austin's ever-changing market and industry.

Nikki loves Austin's creative and industrious energy. There are so many opportunities that living in this great city provides and she's dedicated to helping those who are both established residents or new to the city, buy or sell the property that fits their needs/goals. She is an accomplished negotiator who also understands the financial importance of every real estate transaction. Nikki appreciates that her clients expect personalized counsel, and her attention to detail affords her clients peace of mind, knowing that no element of their transaction will be overlooked. Her aim is to have relaxed and confident clients at the closing table.

Nikki enjoys being a mom to her two daughters, gardening, cooking, playing tennis, singing/writing music and volunteering at her favorite charities.

ACCREDITATIONS

Vivian represents buyers and sellers of residential real estate. She also has experience in property management, investing and remodeling. These skills along with her knowledge of Austin's real estate market help her provide outstanding service that each buyer and seller deserves. Vivian is passionate about the needs and goals of her clients and strives to give them exceptional service. Vivian enjoys helping people find their perfect home or sell their cherished home when they are ready to move. Vivian is married with two adult daughters, enjoys traveling the world, cooking, spending time with family, friends and her lovable dog.

He works closely with clients to understand their goals, timelines, and risk tolerance, then builds a plan that fits real life, not just the listing sheet. His style is direct, thoughtful, and people-first, with a focus on long-term outcomes over short-term wins.

Beyond client work, Josh is deeply involved in creative strategy and education, developing content and systems that help buyers and sellers stay informed in a fast-moving market. He believes that informed clients make better decisions and better decisions lead to better results.

Outside of real estate, Josh is a proud dad, musician, surfer, and tattoo-inspired artist who loves cooking, painting, and creative projects of all kinds. That curiosity and creativity show up in his work every day, bringing fresh perspective and energy to everything he does.

bio:
Erin Pyle is a dedicated Realtor® who found her calling in the world of real estate through her deep passion for architecture and interior design. Born and raised in Northern California, Erin eventually made her way to Austin, Texas, where she has proudly called home for over a decade.

Erin's journey into the real estate industry began with a personal love for beautifully designed spaces. She recognized that a house is more than just a structure; it is a canvas for personal expression, a sanctuary, and a place where memories are made. Inspired by the transformative power of architecture and interior design, Erin embarked on a career that allows her to help people find not just a house, but a home.

With a keen eye for detail and a genuine understanding of her clients' needs, Erin is skilled at matching individuals and families with properties that align with their lifestyle, taste, and aspirations. She believes that a successful real estate transaction is not just about closing deals; it's about building meaningful relationships and creating a seamless experience for her clients.

Erin's strong work ethic, integrity, and personable nature make her a trusted advisor in the real estate industry. She takes the time to listen to her clients' desires, concerns, and goals, ensuring that she provides personalized guidance throughout the entire buying or selling process. Erin is committed to going above and beyond to exceed her clients' expectations, always striving to deliver exceptional results.

Beyond her passion for real estate, Erin is an active member of her community and is deeply involved in various charitable organizations. She believes in giving back and making a positive impact, both in the lives of her clients and in the greater Austin area.

Whether you are a first-time homebuyer searching for the perfect place to start your journey or a seasoned homeowner looking to transition to a new chapter, Erin Pyle is the Realtor® who will guide you every step of the way. Her dedication, knowledge, and unwavering commitment to excellence will help you turn a house into a home that reflects your unique vision and story.

bio:
I’m a proud product of a working-class family from El Paso, Texas. I graduated from UTEP with a degree in History and spent the last 10 years working in athletics — a world that taught me the value of hard work, relationships, and showing up for people.
Now, as a real estate agent, my mission is simple — I’m here to serve the people, not myself. I believe real estate is personal. Every home has a story, and every client deserves someone who will listen, care, and work alongside them to achieve their goals.

Backed by the experience and resources of TRIO Property Group — a team with decades of knowledge in this industry — I’m here to help guide you through the process with honesty, heart, and hustle.

Let’s connect. Let’s talk about what matters most to you. And together, let’s find the place you’ll call home.

bio:
Looking for a Realtor® with a competitive edge? You've found your match! With a professional background in ballroom dance instruction and competition, coupled with extensive customer service experience, I bring a unique blend of skills to the real estate world.

My expertise in ballroom dance isn't just about fancy footwork – it's a testament to my dedication, discipline, and ability to perform under pressure. These qualities translate seamlessly into the realm of real estate, where I'm always ready to go the extra mile to secure the best deal for my clients.

But it's not just about the competition – it's about the connection. With a focus on customer service, I prioritize building relationships and understanding your unique needs and desires. I'm not just here to make a sale; I'm here to make sure you feel confident and satisfied every step of the way.

I have a strong foundation strategically built to stand out among others in the industry. I am a dedicated real estate professional based in Austin, Texas. My journey began under the guidance of my mentor and mother, who is a seasoned expert in both the New York and Texas real estate markets.

My career trajectory has been diverse and dynamic. I started in apartment leasing at one of Austin's largest properties, mastering the intricacies of the local market. Transitioning to apartment locating, I navigated the peak of Austin's real estate boom, honing my skills and helping individuals with unique qualifying concerns find a place to call home.

My experience expanded as I delved into business development for a mortgage lender, gaining invaluable insights into the lending side of the industry. To better understand the challenges my clients face, I purchased and renovated my own home in Austin, collaborating with contractors and learning the ins and outs of the renovation process.

Throughout my career, I've worked closely with investors, helping them rent and market their properties using my extensive reach on social media and online platforms. To provide comprehensive service to my clients, I've built a network of real estate professionals, including experts in lending, roofing, solar, handyman services, cleaning, and pet sitting.

As a full-service realtor, I am committed to standing out in the industry.

bio:
Ryan Rodenbeck: Founder and Broker Associate at Spyglass Realty

Ryan Rodenbeck is widely recognized as one of Austin’s leading real estate brokers. He founded Spyglass Realty in 2008, transforming it from a solo practice into one of the city’s most respected independent brokerages. His vision was simple: build a culture where experienced agents thrive, backed by systems, technology, and mentorship that elevate performance across the board.

Originally from Louisiana, Ryan relocated to Austin in 2001 and quickly built a reputation as a top-producing agent. By 2015, he earned placement in the Austin Business Journal Top 50 Realtors and the Platinum Top 50 Realtors. With a growing client base and proven success, Ryan shifted his focus to building a full-service brokerage. Within a few years, Spyglass Realty scaled from a small team to more than 100 high-performing agents, without hiring part-timers or new licensees. His leadership is centered on helping seasoned professionals double or even triple their production while delivering exceptional client results.

Ryan’s expertise extends beyond brokerage leadership. He has served as an advisor to leading real estate and technology companies, including Ylopo, Workplace by Facebook, and The Genie.ai. His passion for innovation keeps Spyglass ahead of industry trends, particularly in marketing automation and technology adoption.

Beyond brokerage leadership, Ryan is also the host of the RealtyHack Podcast, where he shares insights from industry leaders on brokerage growth, technology, and the future of real estate.

bio:
With over 30 years of diverse experience spanning college basketball coaching, corporate information technology sales, and real estate, Todd brings a unique blend of patience, persistence, and compassion to every client interaction. His well-rounded background gives him a deep understanding of the buying and selling process—from contracts and negotiations to fiduciary responsibilities—allowing him to guide individuals and families toward their real estate goals with integrity and care.

Originally from El Paso, Texas, Todd has called Austin home for the past 28 years. He and his wife, Kyle—his high school sweetheart—are now proud empty nesters after raising their daughter and son in this beautiful city. Todd’s greatest passions are his family, real estate, and basketball, and he finds fulfillment in all three each day: serving clients across the Greater Austin area, cheering on his daughter as she thrives in her career, and supporting his son as he pursues his dreams as a collegiate basketball player. This same dedication he shows to his family is reflected in the way he serves his clients—his commitment, care, and integrity are second to none.

bio:
Gentil is a highly accomplished bilingual real estate agent with a reputation for providing a full-service solution for buyers. With fluency in both English and Spanish, Gentil effortlessly bridges the communication gap between clients and the real estate market, ensuring a smooth and efficient process. Gentil's dedication to service is unmatched, always going the extra mile to understand clients' needs, preferences, and budget to find them their dream property. Whether it's a cozy suburban home or a trendy urban loft, Gentil's expertise and extensive network enable him to offer a comprehensive range of options that meet his clients' unique requirements.

Having accumulated years of experience in the real estate industry, Gentil possesses a wealth of knowledge and insight into the market dynamics. He stays up-to-date with the latest industry trends, property values, and legal regulations to provide his clients with accurate and reliable information. This commitment to staying informed ensures that he can guide his clients in making informed decisions and maximizing their investment potential. With his extensive experience and comprehensive understanding of the real estate landscape, Gentil has successfully assisted numerous clients in finding their ideal homes and investment properties.

bio:
Introducing Ashley Sanchez, an exceptionally accomplished real estate agent whose journey has led her through the dynamic landscapes of California, the vast charm of Texas, and the diverse communities of Nevada and North Carolina. With a unique understanding of the intricacies surrounding interstate moves, Ashley stands out as a trusted professional in the real estate industry.

Ashley has consistently proven herself as a top sales producer, earning the prestigious top producer award at her company for two consecutive years. Her remarkable success in achieving this accolade speaks volumes about her dedication and excellence in the field. With over a decade of experience in sales negotiation, including a background in business-to-business transactions, Ashley possesses a wealth of expertise that sets her apart. Her true passion is helping people, and she finds the deeply personal task of buying and selling homes to be incredibly rewarding. Witnessing clients move into their dream home or earn more than they ever thought possible on the sale of their home is what fuels her commitment to excellence.

Beyond her professional accomplishments, Ashley is deeply committed to making a positive impact on her community. Actively involved with local non-profits, she contributes to the betterment of the areas she serves. Ashley's dedication to her work is evident in her belief that every home sale and purchase is a unique endeavor, prompting her to customize the process to ensure a smooth and personalized experience for her clients.

At the core of Ashley's world are her two daughters, Arianna and Amelia. Together, they form a tight-knit family unit that explores cities, enjoys the Texas lakes for leisurely swims, and discovers the best family-friendly spots. Her commitment to her family and clients, coupled with her consecutive top producer awards, showcases Ashley as an outstanding professional in the real estate industry.

Charlie's business background, serving people, contract negotiations, and personable people skills have greatly influenced his success as an outstanding, successful realtor. Charlie is successful as he puts his client's needs first and always delivers fast, efficient, top-notch service to all of his clients. bio:

My greatest joy in life is my 7-year-old son, Wyatt. As a devoted Disney dad, I take every opportunity to bring a little magic into our lives, especially through family trips to Disney World.
Before beginning my professional journey, I spent my college years working as a chef—a passion that has stayed with me ever since. I love hosting dinner gatherings and cooking for friends and family, creating moments that bring people together. Whether it’s family, food, or a touch of Disney magic, I strive to live life with heart, hospitality, and a love for the experiences that bring people closer.

bio:
Alison Thorn gets things done. And her enthusiasm is contagious. From understanding clients’ needs and developing successful strategies to hammering out details and finalizing deals, Alison’s expertise and optimism guides her clients through every step of the home buying and selling processes. Alison began her career in the world of advertising, where she used her problem-solving skills to produce award-winning television like the Budweiser Lizards Super Bowl spot.

A years-long passion for real estate—building a custom modern home that was designed by noted architect, Burton Baldridge and featured in the NY Times Home Section. "A Modernist Home" was the result of years of dreaming planning, specifying and then, finally - building. Alison also managed her own investment properties—so her transition into real estate full time was a no-brainer. Alison has helped many hundreds of people buy, sell, and invest in property in Austin Texas since getting her license in 2016.

As a long time Austinite, with over 20 years as a Central Austin resident, Alison’s love for the city and deep neighborhood knowledge power her diligence and attention to detail, helping her clients achieve their real estate goals. Alison's personalized, compassionate approach to real estate gives her clients the confidence that they have an advocate working on their side to take them through the next phase of life. She believes that "home" isn't just about one's house - it's your friends, family, neighbors and lifestyle that end up being key components of what makes your home yours. Alison loves introducing newcomers to Austin, taking them to live music shows, restaurants, and exploring different neighborhoods, and helping newcomers and old-timers alike plug into their new neighborhoods and homes to build their best life in Austin and prosper.

bio:
As a native Austinite, I love helping clients find their place in Central Texas or sell their current home to move up, downsize, or relocate. Since 2016, I’ve guided people through one of life’s biggest events—buying or selling a property—offering direction, tools, and concierge-level service tailored to each client’s needs.

Real estate runs in my family—my husband’s career in title and mortgage, along with years of working alongside top professionals, made it a natural path for me. At Spyglass Realty, Austin’s leading tech-driven brokerage, we create innovative solutions for every unique transaction.

Outside of work, I enjoy traveling and time with my husband Toby, our three grown children, two sons-in-law, and two grandsons. Whether it’s new construction, estates, land, 1031 exchanges, leases, or investments, I’d love to hear your goals and help you create a plan to achieve them.

bio: I am a native-born Texan and Austinite since 1997. Buying or selling a home is incredibly exciting and it can be a stressful experience. It is important to have a level-headed agent with a comprehensive understanding of the local market who is familiar with details about different neighborhoods and local amenities. Whatever your circumstances may be, I can help you with all your central Texas real estate needs. As a buyer’s agent, I offer my clients my extensive knowledge of the Greater Austin Area and I invest a lot of time in understanding the unique needs of each client and their families. I spent twenty-two years in the hospitality industry that taught me the importance of a good work ethic, clear communication, and a positive attitude. My three children have given me patience and the adaptability required for this volatile market. As a seller’s agent, my clients will benefit from my detail-oriented approach and ability to navigate the complex process of developing a unique property marketing plan for each client. When you decide to sell your property with me, I will analyze the market in your neighborhood to determine the best pricing strategy and utilize my network of professional photographers, stagers, and contractors to optimize your property for sale. For relocation clients, I am here to assist with all aspects of your move from choosing a location within the Greater Austin Area to helping you find a delicious local bakery or a park to explore. Each client has an individual experience and I will be there to support you throughout your move. My client-centered approach to real estate makes me the right realtor for you. Whether you are looking to purchase a home outside the city or a condo downtown, I will connect you with the perfect space to begin writing your central Texas story. What are you waiting for? Reach out today!

bio: Hey y’all, my name is Michalina Tomczak but I go by Micha. As you may have guessed from my name, I am a second generation US citizen, as both my parents were born in Poland and immigrated in their early twenties to Chicago, where I was born and raised. I attended Truman State University in Missouri for my undergrad and had the honor of representing my college on the basketball court. I am proud to say I am the second leading shot blocker in my school history, and just as I protected the house, I will go above and beyond to protect my client’s interests. I graduated Magna Cum Laude with a Bachelor’s of Science in Health Science and Psychology. I had intentions of continuing my education in medical school, but decided to travel the world and learn from the greatest teacher in life, experience. After graduation, I set up my home base in Austin, where I have lived for the past six years, and worked a variety of jobs, including waitressing, teaching and nannying to afford the 36 countries I have visited. In all these travels, one thing has remained consistent, my love of people. People are my passion. I believe I can help others in one of the most monumental experiences of their lives, purchasing and/or selling a home, by being their fighter and guide in these crazy real estate markets. I am so excited to be starting off my real estate career with Spy Glass Realty as my brokerage and teacher. My mission is to help my clients find their sanctuary and make this grueling process, a journey filled with peace and clarity.

bio:
With over a decade of hands-on experience in construction and property repair, Blake brings a level of expertise to real estate that few can match. Starting in general construction at just 18 years old, he worked up to foreman and general contractor roles at a leading firm in Denver before launching his own business. Over the years, Blake has worn many hats—general contractor, electrician, plumber, framer, flooring and tile installer, drywall expert, shower remodeler, and property repair specialist—gaining an in-depth understanding of homes from the inside out.

This extensive background allows Blake to see beyond surface-level aesthetics, helping clients identify potential high-cost issues versus simple fixes during the home buying process. Whether it’s assessing structural integrity, spotting costly repairs, or guiding sellers on value-boosting improvements, he ensures clients make fully informed decisions with confidence.

Committed to making real estate transactions smooth, stress-free, and profitable, Blake combines construction knowledge with sharp negotiation skills and a client-first approach. Buying or selling a home is one of life’s biggest financial moves, and with Blake by your side, you’ll have an expert who truly understands the bones of a house and the business of real estate.

bio:
Kristin Wellborn is a Texas native and trusted real estate professional who brings a thoughtful, client-focused approach to every transaction. With a background in Business Management and over two decades of experience living in the Austin area, Kristin has built a reputation for delivering high-level service with a personal touch. Her education and previous experience in business operations sharpened her ability to stay organized, manage timelines, and strategically negotiate—skills that directly benefit her clients throughout the buying and selling process. 

Known for her sweet demeanor, empathetic nature, and dedication to her clients’ success, Kristin thrives in residential real estate because she genuinely loves helping people. Whether advising first-time buyers, seasoned sellers, or clients relocating to the Texas Hill Country, she tailors each experience to meet their individual needs. Kristin takes pride in building long-lasting relationships and understands that real estate is more than just a transaction—it’s a significant life moment. Her repeat clients and strong referral base speak volumes about her professionalism, attention to detail, and ability to make each client feel seen and supported. 

Now living in the Texas Hill Country for over four years, Kristin continues to serve clients throughout the greater Austin area with the same enthusiasm and market expertise. When she’s not helping clients, you’ll find her enjoying quality time with family and friends, traveling, hiking and camping, exploring new restaurants, and checking out live music. Her genuine care, hard work, and high standards make her not only a standout realtor but also a trusted partner in every step of your real estate journey.

I strongly believe in providing my clients with great customer service and trustworthy advice, from the very first meeting to the close of the sale. I am dedicated to the best interests of my clients, and I am committed to providing the high level of service they deserve. On a personal note, I have been married for 19 years and have two, beautiful teenage daughters. bio:
Dolph uses his deep analytical skills, strong negotiating skills, and patience to bring his clients an unparalleled real estate experience. His data-driven approach, paired with his love for Central Texas, make him an ideal partner for buyers and sellers at every state of their real estate journey.

Dolph has lived in Austin for the better part of the last thirty years, moving here in the eighties to attend the University of Texas, where he earned his degree in Geology from the Jackson School of Geological Sciences. He spent the first part of his career as a geologist, which gives him a unique perspective on the terrain of Austin real estate and the very different neighborhoods from the Hill County to the west to the plains to the east, and everywhere in between. He also uses his training in scientific analysis as an invaluable tool in determining not only market value for sellers and buyers, but also investment return for real estate investors.

Dolph considers himself his clients' advocate and does not take this responsibility lightly. He has mastered the delicate balance between fierce negotiating and subtle compromise to his buyers' and sellers' advantage throughout his real estate career.

In his spare time, Dolph enjoys spending time with his family and his Australian shepherds and catching as much Longhorn football as he can.
